title: Casper
chase_set_name: stamped and do not have the glossy "Ultra" finish. Collect! 's price guide placed its value at half of the value of the Ultra set. The chase cards appeared only in the Fleer Ultra packs. There are no #13 nor #77 cards; the titles identified in the checklist card are found on a second instance of cards #12 and #69. An Ultra error card has been spotted, bearing a back from the MTV set #1 "Trevor Reveals Himself." Many thanks to Carlos Aranda-Díaz for the chase-card lists! Ultra Box: 36 packs of 6 cards. Common sets: approx. 1.61 per box if collation were perfect. Ultra Jumbo box: 24 packs of 10 cards. Common sets: approximately 1.88 per box. Non-Ultra Box: 18 packs of 6 cards. Common sets: approximately 0.91 per box. Non-Ultra Large Box: 100 packs of 6 cards. Common sets: approximately 5.04 per box.
